The stuff people are usually trying to find."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"A bridge between two worlds"}]},{"type":"text","value":" — My research and development sit at the intersection of WebXR, Three.js, and scientific visualization. But those skills were built on a foundation of creative coders, artists, and open source generosity. The terrain on the landing page — fractal brownian motion, scroll-driven — is my way of honoring that lineage while pointing toward where I'm at: working with real spatial data in three dimensions."}]},{"type":"element","tag":"li","props":{},"children":[{"type":"element","tag":"strong","props":{},"children":[{"type":"text","value":"One link for everything"}]},{"type":"text","value":" — My XR and 2D demos, all in one place.
